text: As I stand in this modern hallway, I sense a quiet anticipation within the glass-walled meeting room, its emptiness echoing potential conversations yet to unfold. Moving closer to the colorful R+D wall, I feel a surge of curiosity and inspiration. The display celebrates innovation, reminding me that every space, every tool, and every gathering has the potential to spark the next big idea. Here, I feel both small and connected to something far-reaching—an undercurrent of progress and exploration.
